---
title: "Sir William Withey Gull 1st. Bt."
---

## Sir William Withey Gull 1st. Bt.

**Dates:** (1816-1890)

### Description

physician

### Biography

He gained his MD in 1846, was FRCP, was created a baronet 1872, and left £344,000 [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from July 27th 1876

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
